description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish to Launchpad that triggers on push to dev, release-v3.1, and release-v3.2 branches. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-latest environment with read-all permissions, checking out the repository, installing system dependencies, and then building and installing various packages including geopmpy, geopmdpy, libgeopmd, and libgeopm. Configure GPG keys, run package.sh, and upload packages to Launchpad PPA using dput.
